rationale: The citing paper references Bronnenberg et al. (2000) mainly in the literature review as prior evidence that product availability varies for new products and that retailer stocking can affect market share. These mentions are either grouped with other sources or used as broad background claims, not as a specific framework the paper adopts or tests directly. The core methodological development in the citing paper is instead anchored in other work (e.g., BLP and Bruno and Vilcassim) and its own new modeling setup.
